prose.en: Provide {param:at-03.01_odp.01} with initial and {param:at-03.01_odp.02} training in the employment and operation of environmental controls.

guidance.en: Environmental controls include fire suppression and detection devices or systems, sprinkler systems, handheld fire extinguishers, fixed fire hoses, smoke detectors, temperature or humidity, heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and power within the facility.

prose.en: {param:at-03.01_odp.01} are provided with initial and refresher training {param:at-03.01_odp.02} in the employment and operation of environmental controls.

objects.en: Security and privacy awareness and training policy
procedures addressing security and privacy training implementation
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for role-based security and privacy training
organizational personnel with responsibilities for employing and operating environmental controls

guidelines.en: personnel or roles to be provided with initial and refresher training in the employment and operation of environmental controls are defined;
the frequency at which to provide refresher training in the employment and operation of environmental controls is defined;
